mapper.select: /* bondScheduleMapper.getMspBondEqistInsertList */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , 'Y' AS MST_YN , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , DECODE(A.SUB_STATUS, 'C', SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), '') AS TMNT_DT , DECODE(TO_NUMBER(NVL(B.INST_MNTH_CNT, 0)), 0, 'N', 'Y') AS INST_YN , TO_NUMBER(NVL(B.INST_MNTH_CNT, 0)) AS INST_MNTH_CNT , NVL(B.INST_ORGIN_AMNT, 0) AS INST_AMT , CASE WHEN UPPER(GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO) = 'NONE' THEN TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1)), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO,0,8), 'YYYYMMDD'), 1)), 'YYYYMMDD') END AS INST_PAY_STRT_DT , CASE WHEN UPPER(GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO) = 'NONE' THEN TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_NUMBER(NVL(B.INST_MNTH_CNT, 1)))), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO,0,8), 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_NUMBER(NVL(B.INST_MNTH_CNT, 1)))), 'YYYYMMDD') END AS INST_PAY_END_DT , B.DVC_OFW_AMNT * 1.1 AS HNDST_AMT , ( SELECT MODEL_DISCOUNT2 FROM MSP_REQUEST X, MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO Y WHERE X.REQUEST_KEY = Y.REQUEST_KEY AND X.CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM ) AS SUBSD_AMT , ( SELECT MODEL_DISCOUNT3 FROM MSP_REQUEST X, MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO Y WHERE X.REQUEST_KEY = Y.REQUEST_KEY AND X.CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM ) AS AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT , UPPER(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO) AS GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO , B.SVC_CNTR_NO , C.PRDT_ID , C.PRDT_SRL_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO B , ( SELECT DISTINCT A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.MODEL_ID AS PRDT_ID, B.PRDT_SRL_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO A , LGS_PRDT_SRL_MST B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.SVC_CT_NUM AND A.MODEL_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND A.INTM_SRL_NO = B.PRDT_SRL_NUM AND A.APP_END_DATE = ( SELECT MAX(APP_END_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND MODEL_ID = A.MODEL_ID ) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.MODEL_ID AS PRDT_ID, B.PRDT_SRL_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO A , LGS_OTCP_SRL_MST B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.SVC_CT_NUM AND A.MODEL_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND A.INTM_SRL_NO = B.PRDT_SRL_NUM AND A.APP_END_DATE = ( SELECT MAX(APP_END_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND MODEL_ID = A.MODEL_ID ) ) C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.SVC_CNTR_NO = B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.APP_END_DATE LIKE '99991231%' AND B.ENGG_MNTH_CNT IS NOT NULL AND SUBSTR(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 0, 6) = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') AND ( CASE WHEN A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND (TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) < 15 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ) = 'Y'

/* bondScheduleMapper.getMspBondEqistInsertList2 */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , 'Y' AS MST_YN , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , DECODE(A.SUB_STATUS, 'C', SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), '') AS TMNT_DT , DECODE(TO_NUMBER(NVL(B.INST_MNTH_CNT, 0)), 0, 'N', 'Y') AS INST_YN , TO_NUMBER(NVL(B.INST_MNTH_CNT, 0)) AS INST_MNTH_CNT , NVL(B.INST_ORGIN_AMNT, 0) AS INST_AMT , CASE WHEN UPPER(GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO) = 'NONE' THEN TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1)), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO,0,8), 'YYYYMMDD'), 1)), 'YYYYMMDD') END AS INST_PAY_STRT_DT , CASE WHEN UPPER(GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO) = 'NONE' THEN TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_NUMBER(NVL(B.INST_MNTH_CNT, 1)))), 'YYYYMMDD') ELSE TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO,0,8), 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_NUMBER(NVL(B.INST_MNTH_CNT, 1)))), 'YYYYMMDD') END AS INST_PAY_END_DT , B.DVC_OFW_AMNT * 1.1 AS HNDST_AMT , ( SELECT MODEL_DISCOUNT2 FROM MSP_REQUEST X, MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO Y WHERE X.REQUEST_KEY = Y.REQUEST_KEY AND X.CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM ) AS SUBSD_AMT , ( SELECT MODEL_DISCOUNT3 FROM MSP_REQUEST X, MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO Y WHERE X.REQUEST_KEY = Y.REQUEST_KEY AND X.CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM ) AS AGNCY_SUBSD_AMT , UPPER(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO) AS GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO , B.SVC_CNTR_NO , C.PRDT_ID , C.PRDT_SRL_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_JUO_ADD_INFO B , ( SELECT DISTINCT A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.MODEL_ID AS PRDT_ID, B.PRDT_SRL_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO A , LGS_PRDT_SRL_MST B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.SVC_CT_NUM AND A.MODEL_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND A.INTM_SRL_NO = B.PRDT_SRL_NUM AND A.APP_END_DATE = ( SELECT MAX(APP_END_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND MODEL_ID = A.MODEL_ID ) UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT A.CONTRACT_NUM, A.MODEL_ID AS PRDT_ID, B.PRDT_SRL_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO A , LGS_OTCP_SRL_MST B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.SVC_CT_NUM AND A.MODEL_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID AND A.INTM_SRL_NO = B.PRDT_SRL_NUM AND A.APP_END_DATE = ( SELECT MAX(APP_END_DATE) FROM MSP_JUO_MODEL_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND MODEL_ID = A.MODEL_ID ) ) C , MSP_BOND_MST D WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND UPPER(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO) <> 'NONE' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUBSTR(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 1, 6) = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') AND D.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO <> B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM

/* bondScheduleMapper.getMspBondUsimInsertList */ SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , NVL(A.SVC_CNTR_NO, A.CONTRACT_NUM) AS SVC_CNTR_NO , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , DECODE(A.SUB_STATUS, 'C', SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), '') AS TMNT_DT , NVL(C.JOIN_PRICE, 0) AS JOIN_PRICE , C.JOIN_PAY_MTHD_CD , NVL(C.USIM_PRICE, 0) AS USIM_PRICE , C.USIM_PAY_MTHD_CD FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST B , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO C WHERE 1 =1 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY AND SUBSTR(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 0, 6) = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') AND ( CASE WHEN A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND (TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD')) < 15 THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END ) = 'Y'
/* bondScheduleMapper.getBondDeleteList */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE 1 = 1 AND SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND (SUBSTR(SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8) - LST_COM_ACTV_DATE) < 15
mapper.delete: /* bondScheduleMapper.deleteMspBondMst */ DELETE FROM MSP_BOND_MST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
/* bondScheduleMapper.deleteMspBondDtl */ DELETE FROM MSP_BOND_DTL WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}
mapper.insert:
/* bondScheduleMapper.insertSelectMspBondStaticMst */
INSERT INTO MSP_BOND_STATIC_MST ( OPEN_YN , BOND_AMT , RCV_AMT , INST_OPEN_CNT ) SELECT SUBSTR(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO,0,6) AS OPEN_YM , SUM(A.BILL_AMT) AS BOND_AMT , 0 AS RCV_AMT , COUNT(DISTINCT A.BOND_SEQ_NUM) AS INST_OPEN_CNT FROM MSP_BOND_DTL A, MSP_BOND_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND SUBSTR(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO,0,6) = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') AND B.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND B.INST_YN = 'Y' AND A.BOND_SEQ_NUM = B.BOND_SEQ_NUM GROUP BY SUBSTR(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO,0,6)

/* bondScheduleMapper.insertSelectMspBondStaticDtl */
INSERT INTO MSP_BOND_STATIC_DTL ( OPEN_YM , BILL_YM , INST_MNTH_NUM , BOND_AMT , RCV_AMT , RMN_CNTR_CNT ) SELECT SUBSTR(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO,0,6) AS OPEN_YM , A.BILL_YM , A.INST_MNTH_NUM AS INST_MNTH_NUM /*, SUM(A.BILL_AMT) AS BOND_AMT*/ , SUM(B.INST_AMT) AS BOND_AMT , 0 AS RCV_AMT , COUNT(A.INST_MNTH_NUM) AS RMN_CNTR_CNT FROM MSP_BOND_DTL A, MSP_BOND_MST B WHERE 1=1 AND SUBSTR(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO,0,6) = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1), 'YYYYMM') AND B.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND B.INST_YN = 'Y' AND A.BOND_SEQ_NUM = B.BOND_SEQ_NUM GROUP BY A.INST_MNTH_NUM, A.BILL_YM, SUBSTR(B.OPEN_DT,0,6) ORDER BY SUBSTR(B.OPEN_DT,0,6)
mapper.select: /** bondChkScheduleMapper.getMspGrntInsrInfoTrgt */ SELECT A. CONTRACT_NUM , A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO , B.SVC_CNTR_NO AS NEW_SVC_CNTR_NO , D.SVC_CNTR_NO AS OLD_SVC_CNTR_NO , A.CONTRACT_NUM , B.EVNT_TRTM_DT AS NAME_CHG_DT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.EVNT_TRTM_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') - 1/(24*60*60), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPL_END_DTTM , D.PRDT_ID , D.PRDT_SRL_NUM , D.PRDT_AMT , D.OPEN_DT , D.INST_AMT , D.INST_CNT , D.INST_PAY_STRT_DT , D.INST_PAY_END_DT , D.GRNT_INSR_AMT , D.GRNT_INSR_STRT_DT , D.GRNT_INSR_END_DT FROM MSP_BOND_MST A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST B , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO C , MSP_GRNT_INSR_INFO D WHERE 1=1 AND A.CHRG_ITEM_CD = 'EQIST' AND A.MST_YN = 'Y' AND SUBSTR(A.OPEN_DT,0,6) = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -2), 'YYYYMM') AND B.EVNT_CD = 'MCN' AND C.PPPO='PO' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SVC_CNTR_NO <> B.SVC_CNTR_NO AND D.APPL_END_DTTM = '99991231235959'
